title: The Ghoul Remastered
description: Get yourself some good equipment for fighting the new "Ghoul" but this is not all, because after this battle you have a new dimension to discover.
body:
In this mod you will have a "final battle" with a creature called The Ghoul, you will need to spawn him in his demonic church by using wither skulls and a nether star, this will be a tough fight that will need the greatest equipment, after the battle you will get a new material and weapons, with this material you will be capable of creating a portal for a new and dangerous dimension. This place is called Dark Aether and it will make you start from "zero" since your tools and armors from the overworld will get corrupted in this dimension, for surviving here you will have to find new materials and ores while escaping the different evil creatures. In this dimension you will find from shadows that will follow you removing your light and having a possibility of jumpscaring you, to friendly survivors of the dimension that you will be able to trade with them for new items. This dimension will also add new bosses, like a spider that spawns underground and the king of this lands, The Devil.



This mod is a remastered version of an other mod called the same, The Ghoul, but I remake all 3d models and textures, create the new dimension and create new enemys so I think is more a remaster rather than just an update.

Mod is still W.I.P but is allready usable.
